nodes.name: Ficedula
nodes.summary: Ficedula（Ficedula）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联34种鸟类，如白眉姬鶲、綠背姬鶲、黄眉姬鹟等34种鸟类。

nodes.name: Rufous-throated flycatcher
nodes.summary: Rufous-throated flycatcher（Ficedula rufigula）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Rufous-throated flycatcher。

nodes.name: Rufous-throated flycatcher
nodes.summary: The rufous-throated flycatcher (Ficedula rufigula) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is endemic to Sulawesi, Indonesia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. References
nodes.shortSummary: The rufous-throated flycatcher (Ficedula rufigula) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is endemic to Sulawesi, Indonesia.
